title: Premium Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Experience studio-quality sound with industry-leading noise cancellation. These premium wireless headphones deliver deep bass, crystal-clear highs, and up to 30 hours of battery life. Perfect for commuting, working, or simply losing yourself in music.
features: Active Noise Cancellation (ANC) with Transparency Mode
30-hour battery life with quick charge (10 min = 3 hrs)
Premium memory-foam ear cushions for all-day comfort
Multipoint Bluetooth 5.3 — connect 2 devices simultaneously
Built-in microphone with AI-powered voice clarity
Foldable design with premium carry case included

title: Smart Fitness Watch — GPS & Heart Rate Monitor
description: Track your fitness goals with precision. This advanced smartwatch features built-in GPS, continuous heart rate monitoring, SpO2 tracking, and 100+ workout modes. With a stunning always-on AMOLED display and 14-day battery life, it's the perfect companion for an active lifestyle.
features: Built-in GPS with route mapping and pace tracking
24/7 heart rate & SpO2 blood oxygen monitoring
100+ workout modes including swimming (5ATM waterproof)
1.43 AMOLED always-on display — 466×466 resolution
14-day battery life with magnetic fast charging
Smart notifications, calls, and music control from your wrist

title: Waterproof Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: Take your music anywhere with this rugged waterproof Bluetooth speaker. Delivering 360° immersive sound with deep bass, it's built to withstand splashes, dust, and drops. Perfect for pool parties, camping trips, or backyard hangouts.
features: IP67 waterproof and dustproof — survives submersion
360° omnidirectional sound with passive bass radiator
20-hour playtime on a single charge
Bluetooth 5.3 with 30m wireless range
Stereo pairing — connect two speakers for stereo sound
Built-in microphone for hands-free calls

title: RGB Mechanical Gaming Keyboard — Cherry MX
description: Dominate your games with this premium mechanical keyboard featuring genuine Cherry MX switches. Per-key RGB lighting, aircraft-grade aluminum frame, and N-key rollover ensure every keystroke counts. Built for competitive gamers and power typists alike.
features: Genuine Cherry MX Red switches — 50M keystroke lifespan
Per-key RGB with 16.8 million colors and dynamic effects
Aircraft-grade aluminum top plate for durability
Full N-key rollover and anti-ghosting
Detachable USB-C braided cable
Dedicated media controls and magnetic wrist rest

title: Anti-Theft Travel Laptop Backpack — USB Charging
description: Travel smart with this anti-theft laptop backpack designed for the modern commuter. Featuring a hidden zipper design, built-in USB charging port, and a padded compartment fitting laptops up to 15.6', it keeps your gear safe and organized on the go.
features: Anti-theft hidden zipper and RFID-blocking pocket
Built-in USB charging port with internal cable routing
Fits laptops up to 15.6 with padded compartment
Water-resistant Oxford fabric exterior
Ergonomic padded shoulder straps with luggage strap
Multiple compartments — 15+ organized pockets

title: 15W Fast Wireless Charging Pad — Qi Compatible
description: Cut the cord with this sleek 15W fast wireless charging pad. Compatible with all Qi-enabled devices, it features intelligent temperature control, foreign object detection, and a slim profile that looks great on any desk or nightstand.
features: 15W fast charge for Samsung, 7.5W optimized for iPhone
Universal Qi compatibility — works with all Qi devices
Intelligent safety: over-charge, over-heat, and foreign object detection
Ultra-slim design (only 7mm thick) with LED indicator
Non-slip silicone surface and anti-slip rubber ring
Includes USB-C cable and 18W Quick Charge adapter
